message:
chore(gitignore): Add .ntm/ pattern for NTM agent coordination

The .ntm/ directory is used by NTM for tracking agent PIDs during
multi-agent coding sessions. This is runtime ephemeral data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,3 +46,6 @@ Desktop.ini
 lcov.info
 tarpaulin-report.html
 coverage/
+
+# NTM agent coordination
+.ntm/
